response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure coding per IEC 62443 — core requirements for this role. Their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only a brief, non-industrial C++ mention from 2014–2015. No evidence of message brokers, multi-threaded C++ systems, MQTT/REST IoT integration, or SDL practices is present.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring.
Proven ability to deliver complex systems with DevOps and CI/CD practices.
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience for industrial automation or high-performance systems.
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle.
No evidence of message brokers, multi-threaded C++ architecture, or IoT protocol implementation.
